summary: Test suite is integration-heavy but lacks fundamental unit test coverage. Core functions (cartesianProduct, applyExcludes, applyIncludes, validateConfig, matchesRule) are untested in isolation. Fixtures are referenced but not defined or validated. Tests rely on brittle string matching in act output rather than JSON parsing. No direct CLI testing or error scenario coverage. Violates stated TDD approach by omitting unit tests, instead jumping to act-based integration tests. Would miss bugs in cartesian product logic, include/exclude behavior, validation edge cases, and malformed output conditions. Poor test independence (single act run, multiple tests depend on it). Missing boundary condition testing (e.g., max-size=1, single-value dimensions). Fixture files (basic.json, with-excludes.json, etc.) are referenced but not provided/created. yaml-parser.ts helper is problematic (writes Python scripts to disk, no error handling). Test structure doesn't match stated requirement to write unit tests first per TDD methodology.
